title: rubus × anfrayi
intro: Rubus × anfrayi, a hybrid species of raspberry native to the eastern United States, is a bramble shrub known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × anfrayi include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
